recommendedProducts.label: CJC/Ipamorelin Peptides Injectable 1.2mg/2mg (5mL) $150.00)Climax Cream (ARGIN/ERGOLOID/PENTOX/SILD/THEOPH) Sexual HealthCream 9/0.075/7.5/1.5/4.5mg/0.21mL; 30mL Tube

requiredNextSteps: Provider review and protocol sign-off required before dispensing or administration.
Complete baseline labs before final protocol approval.
Schedule in-clinic onboarding and first-dose observation (if indicated).

fulfillment.reason: Patient preference (clinic) is eligible for peptides track.

tiers.title: Peptide Foundation
protocol: BPC-157 250-500 mcg once/twice daily or equivalent starter protocol.
Primary: inflammation control, sleep depth, baseline recovery.

tiers.title: Peptide Transform
protocol: CJC-1295/Ipamorelin bedtime pulse + daytime recovery peptide.
Primary: lean-mass retention, tissue recovery, workout response.

tiers.title: Peptide Elite
protocol: Multi-phase peptide strategy with provider-reviewed compound compatibility.
Primary: performance output, body composition, longevity.

providerHandoff.summary: Smoke A: PEPTIDES track, clinic fulfillment, goals=recovery, performance, longevity, symptoms=slow-recovery, inflammation, muscle-loss, fatigue.
dosingFramework: 8-12 week cycle + deload to limit response decay.
Track sleep, soreness, and performance before advancing.
monitoringChecklist: Required baseline labs ordered/reviewed before progression
2-4 week follow-up booked before protocol launch
Patient education confirmed (administration, side effects, red flags)
contraindicationNotes: No hard contraindication flags from intake; provider confirmation still required.

rationale: 4 symptom(s) scored: slow-recovery, inflammation, muscle-loss, fatigue.
Baseline labs not yet completed — conservative entry tier applies.

dosageFramework.startRange: Intermediate peptide protocol reference (e.g., CJC-1295/Ipamorelin combination range or equivalent). Each compound and dose determination require individual provider authorization.
dosageFramework.cadence: 8–12 week cycle with bedtime GH-secretagogue pulse and daytime recovery peptide per provider protocol.
escalationCriteria: Response plateau at foundation tier confirmed with provider review.
Tolerability of single agent established before any stacking.
Provider authorization required for each compound addition.
holdRules: GH-secretagogue protocol: hold if active malignancy is suspected — provider clearance required.
Carpal tunnel symptoms or fluid retention — hold GH-class peptides and provider contact required.
Any new oncologic concern — hold all peptides and provider assessment required.
monitoringCadence: Monthly: recovery metrics, sleep score, body composition trend.
Cycle end: full outcome review; deload or advancement decision with provider.
dosageFramework.providerAuthorizationNote: PROVIDER AUTHORIZATION REQUIRED: This dosage framework is a clinical reference only. No protocol may be initiated, modified, or continued without explicit provider review and authorization. Provider is solely responsible for all prescribing decisions.

warnings: Baseline labs are incomplete; provider should use conservative initiation and confirm safety markers first.

candidates.cadence: Once daily for foundational recovery; may split to twice-daily based on provider review.
rationale: Recovery/inflammation signal detected in goals or symptoms.
Dose scaled by weight + tolerance profile with conservative safety clamp.

candidates.startDose: Provider-start reference: CJC-1295 140 mcg + Ipamorelin 140 mcg at bedtime
candidates.escalationWindow: Provider-reviewed range: 140-240 mcg each bedtime dose
candidates.cadence: Bedtime pulse, 5 days on / 2 days off.
rationale: Bedtime secretagogue pattern aligns with existing protocol cadence.

candidates.cadence: 2-3 doses/week during loading phase; then weekly maintenance.
rationale: Dose aligned to tier intensity and adjusted by tolerance profile.

monitoringChecklist: Monthly: recovery metrics, sleep score, body composition trend.
Cycle end: full outcome review; deload or advancement decision with provider.
